name: @aristotle/gel-timestamp
description: External timestamp anchoring for AristotleOS GEL records. TimestampAuthority interface + LocalTimestampAuthority (filesystem-backed, Ed25519-signed (record_hash, ts) tuples) + verifyTimestampAnchor helper. Closes the shippable portion of LIMITATIONS.md § 3 'no external timestamp authority'; real Sigstore / RFC 3161 TSA clients can implement the same interface in separate packages.
